items.name: Vintage City Chic Tote Bag
items.description: A durable and stylish tote featuring a grommet design complemented by antique metal hardware and a front logo plaque. This tote bag delicately and tediously assembled by Lilee and Advercity is ideal for carrying all your essentials with elegance.
